3.description: Aggregate consumer demand for tokens with two service types. This figure plots aggregate consumers' inverse demand for tokens that can be used to purchase either of the two service types. Providers' cost per token is indicated by the dashed line.

B1.description: Prices of service in the benchmark model and in the model with tokens. The panels plot service prices in the two periods (dashed lines) in the benchmark model (Panel A) and in the model with tokens (Panel B).
